versions.label: LSB
versions.text: "However, the Most High does not dwell in houses made by human hands; as the prophet says: 'Heaven is My throne, and earth is the footstool of My feet; what kind of house will you build for Me?' says the Lord, 'or what place is there for My rest? Was it not My hand which made all these things?'"

context_lines: Acts 7:48-50 should be read within the flow of its chapter and the larger argument of Acts.
explanation_lines: Stephen's sermon concludes with this decisive renunciation of temple theology. It is no accident that he is stoned moments later — the religious leaders knew exactly what his words implied.
